attributes.content:
## Overview

The Immunization Record card gives the workspace a structured home for vaccination record with vaccine name, date, provider, lot number, and next due date.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Immunization Record acts as a canonical operational record. It keeps important facts, state changes, timestamps, and linked parties in one place so downstream workflows, approvals, and reporting can all rely on the same source of truth.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Document]]** -- Immunization Record can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Report]]** -- Immunization Record can feed rollups and summaries that surface trends, status, or outcomes.
- **[[Trigger]]** -- Changes to Immunization Record can fire automation, and automation can also create or update Immunization Record.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Immunization Record can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Contact]]** -- Immunization Record often needs a person-level reference for ownership, communication, or accountability.
- **[[Health Record]]** -- Health Record can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Immunization Record.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Immunization Record as the structured home for vaccination record with vaccine name, date, provider, lot number, and next due date and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Immunization Record when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Immunization Record stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.

cardInfo.name: Immunization Record
cardInfo.summary: Vaccination record with vaccine name, date, provider, lot number, and next due date.
